'''mapara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscnode|oscnode]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscnode|oscnode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mapara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæpæræth|mæpæræth]] || [[word:mæpæræj|mæpæræj]] || [[word:mæpæræsh|mæpæræsh]] || [[word:mæpæræ|mæpæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapaparath|mapaparath]] || [[word:mapaparaj|mapaparaj]] || [[word:mapaparash|mapaparash]] || [[word:mapapara|mapapara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:maparath|maparath]] || [[word:maparaj|maparaj]] || [[word:maparash|maparash]] || [[word:mapara|mapara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapafrath|mapafrath]] || [[word:mapafraj|mapafraj]] || [[word:mapafrash|mapafrash]] || [[word:mapafraf|mapafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maparatha|maparatha]] || [[word:maparaja|maparaja]] || [[word:maparasha|maparasha]] || [[word:maparaka|maparaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maparath|maparath]] || [[word:maparaj|maparaj]] || [[word:maparash|maparash]] || [[word:mapara|mapara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maparathal|maparathal]] || [[word:maparajal|maparajal]] || [[word:maparashal|maparashal]] || [[word:maparakal|maparakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maparathatha|maparathatha]] || [[word:maparajaja|maparajaja]] || [[word:maparashasha|maparashasha]] || [[word:maparaka|maparaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maparathan|maparathan]] || [[word:maparajan|maparajan]] || [[word:maparashan|maparashan]] || [[word:maparakan|maparakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maparathaoro|maparathaoro]] || [[word:maparajaoro|maparajaoro]] || [[word:maparashaoro|maparashaoro]] || [[word:maparakaoro|maparakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
